column1: Nico Hoerner leads the slate with a strong hit probability and a reliable track record, reaching safely in over 70% of games this season. He draws a favorable matchup against Michael Lorenzen and gets a notable park boost. Pete Crow-Armstrong offers similar upside, riding a hot recent stretch and holding the platoon advantage atop the lineup. Corbin Carroll and Ketel Marte are also in play, but Hoerner’s consistency stands out for Beat The Streak selections.
